description: Public starter Transition Matrix for yoga-sequencer shorthand. Each vector models the in-between as origin shape -> pathway modifier -> target shape, with teacher cue text and pacing metadata. Private live-class transcript spans and learned transition weights are not stored in this public repo.

fast.handoff_note: Breath-to-movement transition; DJ layer should crossfade quickly.

medium.handoff_note: Standard vinyasa pathway; keep musical energy continuous.

slow.handoff_note: Teaching-heavy transition; give the cue room before the next musical lift.

transitions.transcript_cue: From down dog, step your right foot forward between your hands. Rise up into crescent with enough time to arrive before you deepen.
From down dog, step your left foot forward between your hands. Rise up into crescent and let the stance settle before adding effort.
Keep the right knee tracking forward, press the back thigh up, and rise into crescent one vertebra at a time.
Plant your hands, step the right foot back, and sweep up into crescent on the next inhale.
Unwind from the prayer twist without rushing the spine, then re-stack the ribs over the pelvis in crescent.
